title: Largest Sum of Averages
hints: Notice that any partition splits the array at specific indices. Can you define a state based on the current index and remaining groups?
This problem exhibits optimal substructure, suggesting dynamic programming. Define dp[i][k] as the max score for A[i:] using k groups.
To compute dp[i][k], iterate over all possible split points j. The score is average(A[i:j]) plus dp[j][k-1]. Precompute prefix sums for fast averages.
